articles.title: General Atomics Receives $20 Million Tax Credit to Advance Fusion Energy Development
articles.description: California Competes award strengthens San Diego’s role as a fusion energy hub SAN DIEGO — General Atomics (GA) announced today it has been awarded a $20 million California Competes Tax Credit from the state of California through the Governor’s Office of Busin…
